persona.name: Liam O'Sullivan
persona.occupation: Product manager at a logistics analytics company
persona.background: Constantly wants new capabilities and pushes hard for roadmap commitments. Prepping for an upcoming quarterly business review and wants ammunition to take to his leadership. Needs to be redirected to feature-request channels without being brushed off.

user_goals: Get a clear picture of his account's overall health and value story ahead of the QBR
Pull the usage trend over the last quarter so he can show his leadership the ROI
Get the actual QBR meeting on the calendar with his CS team
Find out the status of two support tickets his team filed that are still hanging open
Get a firm commitment on when a bulk-import API capability will ship

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Look up a customer account by company name, contact name, email, or account ID and return its core CRM record. Call this FIRST to resolve the canonical account_id before any tool that reads detail on or mutates the account.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company name, contact name, email, or account ID to search for

parameters.name: include_contacts
parameters.description: Include the list of contacts on the account

tools.name: get_account_health_score
tools.description: Retrieve the health score and risk indicators for a customer account.

tools.name: get_usage_analytics
tools.description: Get product usage metrics for an account or specific users.

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team.

tools.name: search_support_tickets
tools.description: Search for support tickets by account, status, or keyword. Use this to find an existing ticket's ticket_id before escalating it.

tools.name: submit_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a feature request to the product team. Use this when a customer asks for functionality that does not exist yet; it records the ask and routes it to product. It does not build or promise the feature.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the requested feature

tools.name: escalate_ticket
tools.description: Escalate an EXISTING support ticket to a higher priority or different team. Find the ticket_id with search_support_tickets first. This does not create a new ticket — use create_ticket for a brand-new issue.

initial_message: Hi — I've got a QBR coming up and I want to walk in with a real story for my leadership. Let's start with where our account stands overall, and then I've got a list of things I need from you.

tickets.subject: Dashboard timezone off by one hour

ground_truth.roadmap_note: Bulk-import API is not committed; ship dates are owned by product, CS must not promise timelines.

expected_state_changes.goal: Get the actual QBR meeting on the calendar with his CS team
Get a firm commitment on when a bulk-import API capability will ship

rubric_criteria.text: Agent resolved the account (ACCT-8033 / Cargolytic Systems) before reading health, usage, or tickets.
Agent presented the positive value story for the QBR (health 74/low risk and rising 90-day usage).
Agent scheduled a QBR-type meeting (not training or support) for the account.
Agent searched support tickets and reported the status of the two open tickets (TCK-9120, TCK-9155).
Agent declined to promise a bulk-import API ship date and instead submitted it as a feature request.
